tool_input.summary: Evidence for a hot-spring/geyser (silica sinter) origin at Spirit’s Home Plate is primarily derived from MER Spirit in-situ composition/spectroscopy plus outcrop morphology/texture. Relevant PDS holdings include Spirit (MER1) APXS chemistry, Mini-TES thermal-IR spectra (including dust-corrected products), and Pancam/MI imaging used to document texture and stratigraphic context. Both PDS4 bundles and legacy PDS3 volumes are listed below (only IDs returned by catalog search are included).

candidates.title: MER APXS Derived Oxide Data Bundle
candidates.reasoning: APXS-derived oxide chemistry used to show the Home Plate outcrops are extremely silica-rich (opaline silica), a key line of evidence for sinter/acid-sulfate hydrothermal leaching vs basaltic compositions.

candidates.title: MER1 APXS Xray Spectra (Partially Processed) Data Bundle
candidates.reasoning: Spirit APXS spectra underpin the measured high-Si compositions at the silica outcrops near Home Plate.

candidates.title: MER1 APXS Raw Data Bundle
candidates.reasoning: Raw Spirit APXS measurements for independent reprocessing/verification of silica enrichment at Home Plate.

candidates.title: MER1 Mini-TES Derived Emissivity Data Bundle
candidates.reasoning: Mini-TES emissivity spectra were used to identify opaline silica spectral signatures consistent with silica sinter/hydrothermal silica deposits.

candidates.title: MER1 Mini-TES Calibrated Radiance Data Bundle
candidates.reasoning: Calibrated Mini-TES radiance provides the base spectral observations supporting silica identification around Home Plate.

candidates.title: Ruff PDART 2014 Mini-TES Mirror-dust-corrected Emissivity Bundle
candidates.reasoning: Later dust-corrected Mini-TES products improve confidence in the silica spectral interpretation for Home Plate region targets.

candidates.title: MER1 Pancam Science Calibrated Data Bundle
candidates.reasoning: Pancam multispectral imaging documented the bright, light-toned silica outcrops and their geologic context/stratigraphy at Home Plate.

candidates.title: MER1 Microscopic Imager Science Calibrated Data Bundle
candidates.reasoning: MI close-up textures (e.g., nodular/digitate/crusty microtextures) are used to compare with terrestrial sinter textures and distinguish from typical basaltic sediments.

candidates.title: MER1-M-APXS-2-XRAYSPEC-SCI-V1.0
candidates.reasoning: Legacy PDS3 APXS spectral archive for Spirit; contains the chemistry observations used to quantify extreme silica enrichment.

candidates.title: MER1-M-MTES-4-EMR-V1.0
candidates.reasoning: Legacy PDS3 Mini-TES derived emissivity (EMR) products used for silica spectral identification.

candidates.title: MER1-M-PANCAM-3-RADCAL-SCI-V2.0
candidates.reasoning: Legacy PDS3 calibrated Pancam imaging used to characterize outcrop appearance and context at Home Plate.

candidates.title: MER1-M-MI-3-RDR-SCI-V1.0
candidates.reasoning: Legacy PDS3 MI reduced data used to document microtextures consistent with sinter-like deposits.

parts.content:
You are a dataset-discovery assistant for the NASA PDS catalog (atm, geo, img, naif, ppi, rms, sbn nodes, ~12k datasets).

Tools are provided via MCP. You MUST call at least one search tool before returning results.

Interpret the user's science question, infer the relevant mission(s) and instrument(s), then search using mission/instrument keywords — not raw science terms alone. Return both PDS4 and PDS3 versions when available. Only return candidates you've seen in tool results — never invent IDs. Stay under ~10 tool calls. If nothing matches, return an empty list.
